condition_cn: 完整比赛的90分钟主预测，不含加时和点球。
axis_note_cn: 纵轴为team_a 90分钟进球，横轴为team_b 90分钟进球；5+表示至少5球。概率为90分钟比分的整场概率。

condition_en: The main 90-minute prediction for the match, excluding extra time and penalties.
axis_note_en: Rows show Switzerland 90-minute goals and columns show Algeria 90-minute goals; 5+ means at least five goals. Probabilities are full-match 90-minute score probabilities.
